issues.objection: 7.27 ships a concrete diagnostic an engineer could actually use. The concrete_scenario names specific tooling and a real role-shape; the falsifiability field forecloses the specific misreading hostile readers would supply. Quotable line: "Like-the-stack and dislike-the-stack, like-the-coworker and dislike-the-coworker — these dualities capture review-percep…" Counter-example carves out where the analog does NOT apply. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Hostile-engineer test for 7.27: would a senior reading this verse mock it as Sanskrit-flavoured productivity content? No. The verse names a discipline (or pathology) with operational specificity. PASS.
